description: Mobile-only plugin commands. Biometric (Face ID / Touch ID) user presence gates the signing actions (migration PLC-op, wallet-confirmed OAuth consent) — the user is the signer, so this is the authorization boundary. The share sheet exports material. The barcode scanner reads the sign-in QR on the OAuth consent scan path (Phase B) — the user carries the binding by scanning the page they are logging into. These plugins exist only on iOS/Android, so this capability is platform-gated and skipped on the macOS host build.
